query:
INSERT INTO state_tax_rates (country_code, state_code, state_name, tax_type, flat_rate, has_local_tax, effective_date, notes) VALUES
-- No income tax states
('USA', 'AK', 'Alaska', 'none', NULL, FALSE, '2024-01-01', 'No state income tax'),
('USA', 'FL', 'Florida', 'none', NULL, FALSE, '2024-01-01', 'No state income tax'),
('USA', 'NV', 'Nevada', 'none', NULL, FALSE, '2024-01-01', 'No state income tax'),

('USA', 'UT', 'Utah', 'flat', 0.0465, FALSE, '2024-01-01', '4.65% flat rate'),
